description_long: This object is a stylized sword with a straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is metallic and light gray, with a simple geometric profile and no visible fuller or serration. The crossguard is rectangular and gold-colored, providing a clear separation between the blade and the handle. The handle is black, cylindrical, and appears to have a subtle texture for grip, ending in a gold pommel with an orange accent at its center. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible engravings or elaborate decorations, giving it a clean and functional appearance. The proportions suggest it is a short sword, suitable for one-handed use.
description: A stylized short sword with a straight, pointed metallic blade, gold crossguard and pommel, and a black textured handle with an orange accent.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, gold crossguard, and the black handle with a gold pommel and orange accent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and the rectangular crossguard, with the handle and pommel visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the straight blade, gold crossguard, and handle details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and the side profile of the handle and pommel.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, black with subtle texture, gold pommel with orange accent
